title: buxus retusa var. gonoclada
intro: Buxus retusa var. gonoclada, also known as Goncalo alves or the boxwood sap, is a plant species that belongs to the Buxaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, including wounds and ulcers. In herbal preparations, Buxus retusa var. gonoclada is often used to make ointments, salves, and infusions, although it should be used with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
